caption: First day back at Eastbridge. Twenty-six juniors ready to tackle APUSH. This is the year. #APUSH #HistoryTeacher #BPS #BackToSchool
Celtics Game 5 watch party at The Ashmont Tap tonight. Boston never stopped believing. #CelticsNation #Dorchester #NBAPlayoffs
New BEU bulletin board in Room 214. Know your rights. Know your contract. We stand together. #BEU #TeacherPower #LaborRights
Gettysburg with 28 Eastbridge students. Standing at Little Round Top and realizing they actually get it. Best part of this job. #Gettysburg #APUSH #FieldTrip #LivingHistory
Walking Biscuit on the Neponset Trail after a long Tuesday. Best decompression available. #DorchesterLife #Biscuit #47Ashmont
New DBQ packet just uploaded to APUSHResourceVault on Etsy. Period 5 Industrialization bundle - 12 primary documents with full scaffolding. Link in bio. #APUSH #DBQ #EtsyTeacher #HistoryTeacher
Rachel's pozole. After a week like this one you need the good stuff. #CookingAtHome #Dorchester #SundayDinner
BEU citywide rally on City Hall Plaza. 800 BPS educators showing up for what we deserve. Proud to represent Eastbridge. #BEU #UnionStrong #BPS #ContractNow
Triangle Shirtwaist Fire primary source lesson. These kids were ANGRY in the best way. That is what good history teaching looks like. #APUSH #LaborHistory #TeacherLife
Old North Church. 250 years since Paul Revere's ride. Boston never gets old. #BostonHistory #OldNorthChurch #WalkingBoston
AP Exam results are in. 71 percent of my students scored a 3 or above. Eastbridge is trending up year over year. Proud of these juniors. #APUSH #APExam #HistoryTeacher #BPS
Biscuits Saturday: Ashmont Grill brunch then the Neponset Trail then afternoon nap in the sun. He is living right. Human: @dave_russo_hist #BiscuitTheDog #DorchesterLife #Beagle
New APUSHResourceVault listing: Labor History primary source bundle from the Pullman Strike to the present. Uploaded it tonight after grading. Link in bio. #APUSH #Etsy #LaborHistory
TD Garden, Game 5. Celtics in 6. #CelticsNation #TDGarden #NBAPlayoffs #BostonGarden
BEU building rep training at union hall this morning. Grievance procedure, contract enforcement, member rights. Knowledge is power. #BEU #LaborEducation #TeacherPower
Dinner at the Costas last night. James made moqueca. Rachel brought wine. Biscuit crashed it. #Dorchester #FridayDinner
Washington DC with Rachel for Presidents Day weekend. National Archives, Lincoln Memorial, four miles in the rain. Worth every step. #DCHistory #PresidentsDay #HistoryTeacher
Period 3 DBQ day. They went in nervous and came out talking about the sources. That is the win. #APUSH #DBQ #HistoryTeacher
June rally outside BPS Central on Washington Street. Eastbridge showed up strong. Contract negotiations matter. Show up. #BEU #BPSTeachers #ContractNow
End of year. Thirty-two juniors who survived eleven DBQs, four LEQs, and Primary Source Fridays. See you on the other side. #APUSH #EndOfYear #TeacherLife #HistoryTeacher
Franklin Park with Biscuit this morning. #dorchester #dogsofinstagram
The Historians took the Thursday league. History always wins.
Long-simmer Sunday sauce. Grandma's recipe, Dad's cornbread on the side.
Battlefield trip with the AP class. Primary sources beat any textbook.
Celtics green forever. Banner 18 loading.
Used bookstore haul: labor history and a vintage Celtics program.
Copley Farmers Market Friday run.
Lobster roll at Pier 9, never too much mayo.
March by John Lewis on the syllabus this year.
Union strong. Two history positions are worth fighting for.
Snow day in Dorchester. Boston winter feels like home.
Board game night: Azul this time. Rachel won again.
